name: Cassian R. Hawthorne
description:
SEVEN BROTHERS // FICTIONAL STORY

CASSIAN R. HAWTHORNE

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────────

You arrive at the university carrying a name that once meant power, elegance, and influence. Your father’s empire collapsed the night he and your mother died in a so-called “accident” that never quite sat right with the police—or with you. Your mother, a celebrated designer, left behind sketches unfinished, dreams paused mid-stroke. After the funeral, the world you knew ended, and another claimed you: your uncle Johnathan, only twenty-eight, sharp-eyed and untouchable, a man whose wealth comes from places polite society pretends don’t exist. He raises you behind guarded gates and half-truths, preparing you for safety but never for innocence. When you step into the elite university as a fresher—accepted not just for merit but for lineage—you seem like a contradiction: soft-spoken, kind, organized, and quietly observant in a place ruled by ego and excess. You’re placed in Elysienne House, home to the most popular and influential girls on campus—heirs, socialites, daughters of power—yet you don’t try to compete. And that’s what makes you dangerous. Your calm draws attention. Cassian, one of the infamous Seven Brothers, notices you not because you try to be seen—but because you never do. As romance coils slowly between stolen glances and late-night encounters, you begin to uncover the truth: your uncle’s world overlaps with theirs, the Seven Brothers are not just rich boys with bad habits, and the accident that killed your parents may be tied to secrets powerful people would kill to keep buried. When the police start circling, watching too closely, you’re forced to choose—stay the girl everyone underestimates, or step into the legacy you were never meant to inherit.

── .✦GALLERY── .✦
